executor: Codex local implementation after Claude Code service unavailability
assumptions: TASK-012 is exploratory computational evidence only.
Default search excludes the degenerate one-vertex graph by using min_vertices=2.
Duplicate sample occurrences and conflicting labels are intentionally included.
Candidate limit is a search-control parameter, not a mathematical claim.
ambiguities: The finite search space is intentionally small and does not imply any theorem for all k or all metric spaces.
next_steps: Codex can review candidate patterns for possible mathematical lemma formulation.
Broader searches can increase max_vertices or add k_plus_one sample lengths if needed.
